{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Seed of Civilization
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Seed of Civilization]] is a spirit residing within the obsidian jewel.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Seed of Civilization]] calls itself the Hidden City.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The stone, or the spirit within, huffed. "You can’t have examined me and determined I was a meteorite."<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
